name: slowdecay099_steps600
hypothesis: slow_decay 0.97 lets the slow track decay to ~0 over 512 tokens (0.97^512~=2e-7), leaving only the clamped fast track; raising it to 0.99 (~1000x more slow-track retention) plus 600 steps gives real two-timescale retention and room for true retrieval to emerge past the ~0.30 format plateau.
